summary: Accessing `ar_output.outputs[0]` without checking if `ar_output.outputs` is non-empty may cause IndexError; add a defensive check or document the contract.
The check `if prompt_images is None:` at line 208 does not catch empty lists, potentially forwarding an empty list; use `if not prompt_images` instead.
The `requires_multimodal_data` parameter is accepted but never checked; either gate multimodal data forwarding on it or update the docstring.
